top_findings.summary: The skill requests "Bash(cmd:*)" (unrestricted bash command execution) which is excessive for a cloud security posture guidance tool. While some command execution might be needed for security scanning, granting unrestricted bash access allows arbitrary system-level operations far beyond the stated purpose of providing guidance, generating configurations, and best practice recommendations. This represents significant privilege escalation risk and could enable unauthorized file access, data exfiltration, or system modifications unrelated to cloud security posture analysis.
